full_text:
Jiang Gan (Ziyi) 蔣幹 (子翼)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Gan (蔣幹), styledZiyi (子翼). Friend of Zhou Yu, he was sent to spy on Wu but was tricked, helping to cause Wei’s defeat at Chibi. Jiang Gan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
